title: Cyber Operations Midshipmen Visit Estonia and the...
description: Learn about the trip U.S. Naval Academy Cyber Operations midshipmen took to Estonia and the NATO Cooperative Cyber Defense Center of Excellence.
text:
Recently, eight USNA Midshipmen had the opportunity to travel to Tallinn, Estonia, for a faculty-led Language, Regional Expertise, and Culture (LREC) trip and attend the 13th Annual NATO International Conference on Cyber Conflict (CyCON), which is an annual conference focusing on the intersection of cybersecurity, policy, and international partnerships.
Click here to read the full story: https://spark.adobe.com/page/qaJu7Utoo5Blb/
